text:
Jose Medina 
Room 101 
Carson 
 
What my father means to me i\\s that he is very hard working and protective.He is a hard worker 
because he works almost everyday and   carries a lot of stuff because he works in construction. 
His job is hard and takes a lot of strength but he can handle it,he does it in order to provide for 
us, he  is also very protective of us because if somebody is in danger he helps us, he wont let 
anyone hurt us.That is why my dad is special to me.Whe are a safe and happy family because 
he is in our lives.I am grateful.
